step.name: scaffold-lists-and-wip
step.action: Create 5-7 lists in order (Backlog → Ready → In Dev → Review → QA → Done). Encode WIP in list names ("In Dev (WIP: 3)").

step.name: closed-list-labels
step.action: Create up to 12 labels. Type per card (Feature/Bug/Tech Debt/Docs). Priority (P0-P3). Modifier (Blocked, Quick Win). No ad-hoc additions.

step.name: enable-custom-fields
step.action: Enable story_points, sprint, component. Migrate any title-embedded data into fields.

step.name: butler-rules-documented
step.action: Configure mechanical rules (checklist-complete → Done, 7-day stale → Stale label). Document each rule in constitution.md. Remember: Butler doesn't fire on API moves.

step.name: api-integration-cached-ids
step.action: Cache board/list/label IDs at session start. Cap writes at 80 req/10s. Handle 429 with backoff. Explicit archive call after Done move.
step.output: Agent integration with cached IDs + validator pass.
